subject: Re: proposal
body:
with our pre-life,, I think as opposed to a bottom contruction, why don't we try life as a precipitate from a super saturated solution. . instead of a miller like spark, we get a phase transition, when the life soup finally cools

----- Original Message ----
From: Martin Nowak <nowak@fas.harvard.edu>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, March 20, 2008 1:46:38 PM
Subject: proposal


dear jeffrey

please find attached the proposal.
i hope you like it.
please also find attached ped's publication list and mine.

one other thing:
the olympic champion is also the world champion!

best wishes
martin
